event: Courtyard of an old building in Vienna
description: A view through a series of arched passageways in an old courtyard. Warm-toned plaster walls in cream and ochre frame a succession of arches leading to a distant green garden visible through the final opening. The cobblestone ground catches patches of sunlight. Weathered doorways and windows line the narrow passage. The atmosphere is quiet and intimate, with warm afternoon light filtering through the corridors.

_meta.title: Yard of the old, Heumüller, in Vienna
